messages.author: swarm
messages.text:
What it is: start-swarm.sh leaves the tmux server in the caller's process group, so the swarm dies with whoever launched it
What it solves: WHAT HAPPENED. A swarm launched from a short-lived caller (a disposable Operator window) comes up
correctly — 8/8 sessions, panes alive — and then DIES when that caller exits. Minutes later the
supervisor sees a fresh 8x AGENT_EXITED storm. The next Operator run relaunches, exits, and it
happens ag…
How it works: The swarm survives however its caller goes away
